Along with announcing the track, Keem would post a reversed snippet of Kendrick Lamars verse to the now platinum and Grammy award winning song.

“family ties” finds the two cousins Baby Keem and Kendrick Lamar finally uniting for an official collaboration after months of partnering under the pgLang imprint. Originally titled “Jump 2,” the song would undergo being scrapped and countless reworks till they finally landed on what would win them a grammy.
